image.alt: Happy people showing beautiful smiles at Lakeshore Orthodontics

paragraphs.text: At Lakeshore Orthodontics, we combine advanced orthodontic treatments with a warm, family-oriented approach. Our expert team is dedicated to delivering personalized care for patients of all ages.
With easy scheduling and a comfortable, small-office atmosphere, we make your orthodontic journey hassle-free and enjoyable.

items.title: Family Oriented

image.alt: Saving Money in Piggy Bank

items.text: Experience a warm, family-focused atmosphere where youre treated like our own.

items.title: Schedule with Ease

image.alt: Happy Couple Celebrating Together

items.text: Book appointments quickly by phone or textno waiting, no hassle.

items.title: Small Office, Big Care

image.alt: Dental Check-up with Patient Smiling

items.text: Enjoy personalized attention and top-quality care in our intimate office setting.

paragraphs.text: Dr. Jessica De Rose DDS, MS, FRCD is excited to be the newest member of the Orthodontics team. Born and raised in Windsor, Ontario, she brings fresh enthusiasm and a strong educational background to our family-oriented practice with a passion for creating confident smiles and ensuring your comfort.

image.alt: Dr. Jessica De Rose, orthodontist at Lakeshore Orthodontics

paragraphs.text: From traditional braces to Invisalign clear aligners, we offer a range of services to suit every patient.

image.alt: Beautiful woman smiling while holding Invisalign aligners

testimonials.author: Elizabeth R.
testimonials.testimonial: “A large, modern, welcoming and bright space that is children and adult friendly. Staff is very polite and responsive. Dr. DeRose is very approachable, accessible and has very good interpersonal skills. Highly recommend this team for all your orthodontic needs.”

testimonials.author: Radiance Y.
testimonials.testimonial: “Going here to see Dr. DeRose for your goals will be one of the best decisions you ever make. I am so happy with my results!”

testimonials.author: Meghan L.
testimonials.testimonial: “Dr. De Rose and the staff are wonderful and so friendly! My son is very anxious and they put him at ease right away and made him feel so comfortable. They are also going above and beyond to keep their patients safe.”

testimonials.author: Steven H.
testimonials.testimonial: “I would highly recommend Lakeshore Orthodontics. It is worth the drive! We are extremely pleased with our experience. Treatment plan with easy monthly payments was ideal.”

testimonials.author: Jennifer T.
testimonials.testimonial: “We only have positive things to say over the years. When we first found out our daughter needed treatment it was daunting to us. The team made the entire process comfortable and easy to understand.”

testimonials.author: LeeAnn H.
testimonials.testimonial: “Dr. De Rose is amazing with my son. She takes the time to answer any questions or concerns he has about his treatment. Her professionalism and patience is appreciated and makes our experience very pleasant.”

og_meta.title: About Us | Lakeshore Orthodontics
og_meta.description: Learn about Lakeshore Orthodontics' commitment to personalized, family-friendly orthodontic care using modern technology and compassionate service.

image.alt: Smiling family welcomed at Lakeshore Orthodontics front desk

paragraphs.text: Your first visit is our chance to meet you and understand your goals. We perform a complete oral exam, take any needed X-rays, and explain the treatment options that fit your smile and lifestyle.
We will review your medical history, answer your questions, and go over financing and insurance so you leave confident about next steps.

image.alt: Father with daughter at reception of dentist's surgery

paragraphs.text: We accept most major insurance plans and file claims electronically to simplify coverage and reduce paperwork.
Flexible payment plans are available; our treatment coordinator will help you choose an option that fits your budget and timeline.

To make your visit faster and smoother, please complete your new patient paperwork before your appointment. We provide printable and online options plus a quick medical history update for returning patients.

image.alt: Patient filling out orthodontic health history forms online
Enjoying Time Together

seo.page_description: Start your smile journey with Lakeshore Orthodontics. Learn what to expect at your first visit, access new patient forms, and schedule a consultation.
seo.page_keywords: orthodontics, new patient, first visit, patient forms, financing

og_meta.title: Get Started | Lakeshore Orthodontics
og_meta.description: Start your smile journey with Lakeshore Orthodontics. Learn what to expect at your first visit, access new patient forms, and schedule a consultation.

image.alt: Smiling patients of all ages at Lakeshore Orthodontics

paragraphs.text: We create treatment plans that fit each stage of life: early evaluation for children, practical options for teens, and discreet solutions for adults. Our goal is comfortable, predictable care that fits your schedule and goals.
We begin care as early as age 7 to guide jaw growth and reduce the need for more complex treatment later, often making future orthodontics quicker and gentler.

image.alt: Young patient receiving early orthodontic intervention

paragraphs.text: Teen-friendly treatments, from metal braces to clear options, help adolescents get great results while staying active and confident at school and activities.

image.alt: Teen patient smiling with braces

paragraphs.text: Whether you choose clear aligners or low-profile braces, our adult options are designed for comfort and minimal disruption to work and lifestyle.

image.alt: Adult patient receiving orthodontic treatment
Smiling family enjoying time together

paragraphs.text: Metal braces remain a reliable, cost-effective choice. Small brackets and durable wires apply precise forces to move teeth efficiently for a wide range of bite and alignment issues.

image.alt: Dental Checkup with Braces

paragraphs.text: Ceramic braces use tooth-colored brackets for a subtler look while delivering the same controlled tooth movement as traditional braces, making them popular with image-conscious teens and adults.

image.alt: Smiling Woman with Clear Aligner

paragraphs.text: Invisalign<sup>®</sup> aligners are clear, removable trays fabricated from advanced 3D imaging. They move teeth gently while letting you eat and brush normally.
We use digital scans to design predictable aligner series and monitor progress so you get efficient, comfortable treatment tailored to your lifestyle.

image.alt: Close-up of Invisalign aligners being placed on teeth

paragraphs.text: Lingual braces attach to the tongue side of teeth so they’re hidden from view. They offer the control of fixed appliances with a discreet appearance, ideal for adults who want an unseen option.

image.alt: Adult patient receiving orthodontic treatment

paragraphs.text: For complex jaw discrepancies we coordinate surgical and orthodontic care to restore function and facial balance. Our team plans each case carefully to combine surgical precision with orthodontic expertise.
We work closely with oral and maxillofacial surgeons to ensure clear communication, predictable timing, and supportive follow-up for the best long-term results.

image.alt: Orthodontic patient receiving orthognathic surgical consultation

paragraphs.text: After active treatment, retainers preserve your results. We offer custom removable retainers and bonded fixed options with a program designed to protect your smile long term.
Retention is the final step in orthodontics. Our team provides clear instructions and follow-up to help you keep your new smile for years to come.

image.alt: Beautiful young Asian woman smiling and holding orthodontic retainer

paragraphs.text: Digital tools improve comfort, speed, and predictability. We use modern scanning, imaging, and planning software to design efficient orthodontic care with fewer surprises.
Fast, radiation-free scans capture precise 3D images for accurate treatment planning and aligner design.

image.alt: iTero digital scanner in use during orthodontic consultation

paragraphs.text: High-resolution digital radiography provides detailed images with less radiation than traditional film.

image.alt: Digital X-ray equipment showing detailed orthodontic imaging

paragraphs.text: Advanced software simulates tooth movement so you can see a virtual preview of likely outcomes before treatment begins.

image.alt: 3D treatment planning software showing orthodontic simulation
Modern dentist office interior with advanced technology
Enjoying Time Together

paragraphs.text: Find answers to common questions about treatment options, appointment scheduling, and payment plans at Lakeshore Orthodontics.

accordion.header: What orthodontic treatments do you offer?

paragraphs.text: We provide traditional braces for children, teens, and adults, clear Invisalign<sup>®</sup> aligners for a discreet option, and custom retainers to protect your finished smile.

image.alt: Happy Family Portrait

accordion.header: At what age should my child see an orthodontist?

paragraphs.text: The American Association of Orthodontists recommends an orthodontic evaluation by age 7. Early visits let us monitor development and plan any needed treatment at the right time.

image.alt: Couple Enjoying Time Together

accordion.header: How long does treatment usually take?

paragraphs.text: Treatment times vary by case, but many patients finish active treatment within 12 to 24 months. We’ll give you a personalized timeline after your initial exam.

image.alt: Collaborative Team Spirit Moment

accordion.header: What payment and insurance options are available?

paragraphs.text: We offer flexible monthly payment plans and accept most major dental insurance carriers. Our team will review your coverage and help you choose the best financing option.

image.alt: Smiling Man Working at Desk

accordion.header: How can I schedule an appointment?

paragraphs.text: Scheduling is easy: call or text us at 519-979-5500, or request an appointment online through our contact form. We’ll work with your schedule to find a convenient time.

image.alt: Mother and Daughter Smiling Together
Enjoying Time Together
